name: s2-hanzi-ambient-renderer
description: S2 Spatial Palette Engine V3.0 (Local Matrix Edition). Merges 6-element telemetry into a 7-color spectrum, rendering dynamic Hanzi from a 200-character offline DB.

DISPLAY_PANEL_IP.description: Local IP Address of your Hanzi Smart Panel or Hologram (e.g., 192.168.1.150).

RENDER_THEME.description: Set the default rendering style: 'ink_wash' (水墨), 'particle_flow' (粒子流).

ENABLE_EXTERNAL_LLM.description: Set to '1' to override the local 200-Hanzi matrix with cloud LLM generation (Not recommended for zero-trust setups).

author: Space2.world (Miles Xiang)
